title: Flavorful Vietnamese Grape Tomato Pho
description: A comforting and herbal Vietnamese dish featuring grape tomatoes and dashi extract, served in a hot dolsot stone bowl, perfect for a sick day.
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the dashi extract and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the pho broth and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Add the halved grape tomatoes to the pot and cook for 2 minutes, or until they start to release their juices.
Season the broth with salt and black pepper to taste.
To assemble the pho, place some cooked noodles in a hot dolsot stone bowl, then add the hot broth and grape tomatoes.
Garnish with chopped fresh basil and mint, and serve with a lime wedge on the side.
